title: IMMZD2DTRotavirus ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTRotavirus ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: Client's age is less than 6 weeks-41
Client is not due for rotavirus vaccination-48
No rotavirus primary series doses were administered-118
Client's age is between 6 weeks and 24 months-52
No live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks-92
Client is due for rotavirus vaccination-44
Live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks-92
One rotavirus primary series dose was administered-118
Two rotavirus primary series doses were administered-118
Client's age is between 6 months and 24 months-52
The series administered to the client is a mixed series or a series with unknown vaccine products-169
Live vaccines was administered in the last 4 weeks-92
No live vaccine was administered in last 4 weeks-92
The series administered to the client contains the same product-169
The series contain more than two doses-27
Live vaccine was administered in last 4 weeks-92
The series contain less than or equal to two doses-27
Rotavirus immunization schedule is complete-49
Three rotavirus primary series doses were administered-118
Rotavirus immunization schedule is complete-50
Client's age is more than 24 months-27
Client is not due for rotavirus vaccination if immunization schedule is not complete.-109

narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD2DTRotavirus ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD2DTRotavirusVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
